title: oxybasis ambigua
intro: Oxybasis ambigua, also known as Chenopodium ambrosioides, is a plant species that belongs to the genus Oxybasis and is commonly referred to as Mexican tea or epazote. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, particularly in Mexico and Central America, for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing nausea and anxiety, and aiding in digestion. Oxybasis ambigua can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
